issue_title: gh v2.22.0 not able to edit issues or pr against ghe
issue_body:
### Describe the bug
```
❯ gh --version
gh version 2.22.0 (2023-01-25)
https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/tag/v2.22.0
```

while trying to edit an issue or pr i get following error message:
```
❯ gh issue edit 855
Message: Field 'projectItems' doesn't exist on type 'Issue', Locations: [{Line:1 Column:145}]
Message: Variable $endCursor is declared by IssueProjectItems but not used, Locations: [{Line:1 Column:1}]
```
this worked before the upgrade to 2.22.0 with version 2.21.2 

i also added the new scope to my token.

remote github is GHE 3.6.7

### Steps to reproduce the behavior

1. gh pr edit <number>
3. See error

### Expected vs actual behavior

I should be able to edit the issue by choosing which fileds to edit
pr_title: Fix ignoring ProjectsV2-specific errors for GHES
pr_body:
It was a capitalization issue when scanning error message text.

Fixes https://github.com/cli/cli/issues/6917
Followup to https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/6735
